claim: Traditional IDEs where code is the focus will become obsolete; the future is agent manager interfaces where multiple agents work in parallel on different features/projects
actionable: Shift from code-centric IDE design to task orchestration interfaces that manage parallel agent swimlanes
source_title: The Way We Use AI Will Completely Change in 2026

claim: Code execution is replacing tool calling because tool definitions upfront overwhelm agents; code execution lets agents generate capabilities at runtime via API interaction
actionable: Replace large tool sets with code execution environments and let agents write code to interact with APIs dynamically
source_title: The Way We Use AI Will Completely Change in 2026

claim: Progressive disclosure (loading capability metadata upfront, full instructions on-demand) allows agents to scale to unlimited capabilities without token bloat
actionable: Implement progressive disclosure by providing capability descriptions, then loading full scripts/guides only when agents request them
source_title: The Way We Use AI Will Completely Change in 2026

claim: Engineers will shift to being system architects instead of coders; code generation will be delegated entirely to coding agents, mirroring civil engineering evolution
actionable: Focus on system design, architecture, and validation rather than code authoring; treat agents as the implementation layer
source_title: The Way We Use AI Will Completely Change in 2026

claim: Artifact reviews (testing via browser recordings, demos, screenshots) will replace diff reviews because agents can prove their work visually
actionable: Validate agent work by reviewing browser recordings and artifacts instead of reading diffs
source_title: The Way We Use AI Will Completely Change in 2026

claim: Experienced engineers will ship code they've never read because trust in agent systems and validation processes will replace code review as the safety layer
actionable: Build validation and testing systems that replace code review as the safety gate
source_title: The Way We Use AI Will Completely Change in 2026
